price: 116. They said: "If you cease not, O Nûh (Noah) you will surely be among those stoned (to death)."
arabic: قَالُواْ لَئِن لَّمۡ تَنتَهِ يَٰنُوحُ لَتَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلۡمَرۡجُومِينَ

version.title: English Translation - Hilali and Khan
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into English by Taqi-ud-Din Al-Hilali and Muhsen Khan

meta.transliteration: qālū la-in lam tantahi yānūḥu latakūnanna mina al-marjūmīna
